notes: Joint consortium of American Express, Discover, JCB, Mastercard, UnionPay, and Visa. Publishes EMV specifications for chip cards, contactless payments, mobile payments (tokenization, 3-D Secure, etc.). Paid for non-members; members access via their network.

data.notes: Multi-book specification series for chip cards (Book 1: Application Independent ICC to Terminal Interface; Book 2: Security and Key Management; Book 3: Application Specification; Book 4: Cardholder, Attendant, and Acquirer Interface).

examples.note: EMV Book 2 — Security and Key Management
